name: nox-mem-conflict-detection
description: L2 — KG conflict detection (memanto Gap #5 differentiator). Type 1 direct contradictions end-to-end, shadow-first with append-only audit, zero auto-mutation of kg_relations in v1.

scripts.test: tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json && node --test dist/src/lib/conflict/__tests__/*.test.js dist/src/cli/__tests__/*.test.js dist/src/api/__tests__/*.test.js dist/src/mcp/tools/__tests__/*.test.js
